allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: add n8n healthcheck and service_healthy dependency for provisioner

The n8n-provision container was starting before n8n was ready to accept
API requests, causing exit code 1 failures. This adds a healthcheck to
the n8n service and makes n8n-provision wait for service_healthy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
